title: Send notification in slack from specific group when new item is createdd
excerpt: Hi, I integrated slack to my Monday board. I have 1 board and 7 group . how can set new item is created notification on specific group ? I don’t want that I got notification when item is created in every group.

posts.author: levank (levan)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, I integrated slack to my Monday board. I have 1 board and 7 group . how can set new item is created notification on specific group ? I don’t want that I got notification when item is created in every group.
